---
title: "Describe a dataset"
format: html
---



## load the data 

describe-data/data/attractive.csv
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

attractive <- read_csv("data/attractive.csv")
attractive

```



## Exercises

### What's the size of that data?


### What shape does that data table have?


### Review each column: what type of variable is it?


### What can you say about the values of each column?


### How could you visualize the distribution of those values?


### How could you quantify the relationships between two columns?


### How could you visualize the relationship between two variables?
